note: Project-scoped. Fuses conversion craft with performance/accessibility so the page is fast AND converts — competitors treat pretty, fast, and accessible as separate concerns; this pack ships them as one. The hero LCP-budget rule encodes conversion and Core Web Vitals as a single standard.

standards.rule: Value proposition plus primary CTA are above the fold (above-fold content gets ~84% more attention).
One dominant CTA intent per page; repeat the SAME CTA down long pages, do not compete CTAs.
Minimize form fields; prefer a multi-step form for longer asks (each added field raises abandonment).
Place social proof / trust badges adjacent to the conversion ask, not orphaned in a footer.
standards.source_title: CRO: social proof near the ask

standards.rule: Mobile-first layout; 65-80% of landing traffic is mobile.
Hero LCP budget: prioritize the LCP element (no lazy-load, preload, sized) to hit cross-cutting LCP<=2.5s — one rule for conversion AND CWV.
